HTML template for the footer section of documentation, including Doxygen integration.

# Purpose
The content is part of an HTML template used to generate documentation with Doxygen, a documentation generator tool. It includes a copyright notice under the Apache License, Version 2.0, which specifies the terms under which the file can be used. The template contains sections for generating a navigation path (`nav-path`) and a footer, which includes a link to the Doxygen website and an image representing Doxygen. The template uses placeholders such as `$navpath`, `$generatedby`, `$relpath`, and `$doxygenversion` to dynamically insert content during the documentation generation process. The sections marked with `<!--BEGIN GENERATE_TREEVIEW-->` and `<!--END GENERATE_TREEVIEW-->` indicate conditional content that is included based on whether the tree view feature is enabled in the Doxygen configuration.
